name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Tucson, AZ location of US Cash Advance at 5651 S 12th Ave provides same-day payday and title loans to South Tucson residents.
description_long:
US Cash Advance's Tucson location at 5651 S 12th Ave #1 is a standalone storefront in South Tucson, open Monday through Friday from 8AM to 9PM and Saturday-Sunday from 10AM to 7PM. The branch serves the local community with fast access to emergency cash loans.

At this Tucson, AZ location, you can apply for payday loans and title loans with transparent terms and quick approval. Call 520-614-0097 to discuss your loan options or visit in person during business hours to start your application.

If you need emergency cash in Tucson, bring a valid photo ID, recent pay stub, and proof of address to this South Tucson branch. Most applications are processed the same day, so you can walk out with cash when you need it most.
pros: Same-day or rapid funding (within hours according to customer reviews)
In-person service with transparent staff who explain terms clearly without hidden fees
Accepts all credit types including bad credit with no credit check options
Loan amounts up to $50,000 for bad credit products
Quick application process reported under 45 minutes in-person
cons: Website content is incomplete and cuts off mid-sentence when discussing APR and terms
Actual interest rates and loan terms are not disclosed on the website
Operates through third-party lenders rather than direct lending
Physical location limited to Detroit, Michigan; online process details unclear
Waiting area reported as cramped by customers
best_for: Consumers with bad credit who need cash urgently for medical bills or immediate expenses
People without access to traditional bank loans seeking same-day funding
Borrowers who prefer in-person interaction and staff guidance through the application process
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best suited for consumers in emergency financial situations who have poor credit and need same-day cash access, particularly those comfortable with in-person service. The critical caveat is that actual loan terms, APR, and repayment details are not publicly disclosed on the website, making it impossible to verify whether rates are competitive or predatory—a major red flag for any emergency lending product.
meta_description: Tucson, AZ US Cash Advance at 5651 S 12th Ave. Same-day payday and title loans with fast approval.
